evals.prompt: I have a feature request document at evals/files/offline-queue-prd.md for adding an offline queue to our warehouse inventory scanner app. Please extract the SDD knowledge from it — create the structured knowledge files (index.md, requirements.md, approach.md, etc.) in a knowledge/ directory. Do NOT fabricate any requirements or information that isn't in the source document.
evals.expected_output: A knowledge/ directory with index.md, requirements.md, approach.md, ux-ui.md (since the source mentions UI banner), gaps.md, and supplementary.md containing all facts from the PRD with no fabricated content.
expectations: knowledge/approach.md exists and mentions tech stack (Kotlin/Compose/Room)
No fabricated requirements: output does NOT contain invented features
Preserves timeline: mentions September 30 or Q3

evals.prompt:
Here's a feature request I got on Slack. Extract the SDD knowledge from it into structured knowledge files:

---
ok so my boss just sent me this xlsx file (its in my downloads, called something like 'Q4 sales final FINAL v2.xlsx') and she wants me to add a column that shows the profit margin as a percentage. The revenue is in column C and costs are in column D i think
---

Create the knowledge files in a knowledge/ directory. Don't fabricate — only include what's actually in the source.
evals.expected_output: A knowledge/ directory with index.md, requirements.md, approach.md (likely sparse), gaps.md, and supplementary.md. ux-ui.md should NOT be created since there's no UI content. Many gaps due to minimal input — missing info should be surfaced as concrete questions in gaps.md.
expectations: knowledge/ux-ui.md does NOT exist (no UI in source)
knowledge/gaps.md exists with many gaps (sparse input)
requirements.md mentions columns C and D
No fabricated requirements: output does NOT add unmentioned features

evals.prompt: I have sprint planning notes at evals/files/sprint-planning-notes.md. This doc covers multiple features. I want you to extract the SDD knowledge specifically for the 'Dark Mode Toggle' feature (the first agenda item). Ignore the other features for now — focus only on what the meeting notes say about dark mode. Create the structured knowledge files in a knowledge/ directory. Don't fabricate.
evals.expected_output: A knowledge/ directory with knowledge extracted only about Dark Mode Toggle (not Search Autocomplete or Newsletter). Should include ux-ui.md since Diana's Figma mockups are mentioned. Must include supplementary info like stakeholder comments and action items. No content about other features should leak in.
expectations: Scope isolation: output does NOT mention Search Autocomplete
Scope isolation: output does NOT mention Newsletter
knowledge/approach.md mentions CSS custom properties or tokens.css
